title: The people behind the papers - Yongjun Yin and David Ornitz.
abstract: During alveologenesis, multiple mesenchymal cell types play crucial roles in maximising the lung surface area. In their study, David Ornitz and colleagues define the repertoire of lung fibroblasts, with a particular focus on alveolar myofibroblasts. To know more about their work, we spoke to the first author, Yongjun Yin, and the corresponding author, David Ornitz, Alumni Endowed Professor at the Department of Developmental Biology, Washington University School of Medicine, St. Louis.
